intake.user_request: Create the Phase 1 workorder from the updated CODEREF-CORE roadmap.md (Scanner / Element Extraction — Identity + Taxonomy Ratification).

classification.plan_type_rationale: Roadmap Phase 1 is one of nine sequential, gated phases. The work has internal task ordering (ratify ID -> add taxonomy fields -> collapse parallel scanner -> remove overclaimed features) and a hard stop before Phase 2.

in_scope: ratify createCodeRefId in src/utils/coderef-id.ts as the single canonical ID generator
add layer (enum), capability (kebab-case string), constraints (string array), and headerStatus (enum) to ElementData
validate layer against STANDARDS/layers.json enum at scanner output time
document file-grain vs element-grain rule for taxonomy fields in scanner schema
ensure nested/local functions and class methods get distinct qualified names
collapse the parallel scanner so src/semantic/orchestrator.ts consumes PipelineState instead of running its own AST scan
route populate-coderef --semantic through the main pipeline only
remove or downgrade overclaimed scanner features (decorators, docstrings, return types, complexity)
update scanner schema docs to match real output
out_of_scope: implementing the semantic header parser (that is roadmap Phase 2.5)
graph construction or graph validation (Phases 5 and 6)
modifying the canonical header grammar BNF in analyze-coderef-semantics/SKILL.md

constraints: STANDARDS/layers.json is the only source of truth for the layer enum.
Do not invent a second canonical ID format.
Header parsing is NOT in scope for this phase; headerStatus is populated only by the marker that the parser will exist (default missing).
Only one file walk per pipeline run after this phase exits.
Do not break existing semantic-registry.json projection consumers; the projection seam remains unified.
